# mgc_container_registry_scan (Resource)

Schedules a vulnerability scan for an image stored in a Container Registry. Destroying the resource attempts to stop an ongoing scan but does not remove historical scan data.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `digest_or_tag` (String) Digest or tag of the image to scan
- `registry_id` (String) ID of the registry containing the image
- `repository_id` (String) ID of the repository containing the image

### Read-Only

- `architecture` (String) Architecture of the scanned image
- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the scan was scheduled
- `digest` (String) Digest of the image that was scanned
- `finished_at` (String) Timestamp when the scan finished
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the scan
- `input_tag` (String) Tag used to identify the image when scheduling the scan
- `os` (String) Operating system of the scanned image
- `severity_summary` (Object) Vulnerability counts grouped by severity (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--severity_summary))
- `status` (String) Current status of the scan
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the scan was last updated

<a id="nestedatt--severity_summary"></a>
### Nested Schema for `severity_summary`

Read-Only:

- `critical` (Number)
- `fixable` (Number)
- `high` (Number)
- `low` (Number)
- `medium` (Number)
- `total` (Number)
